patch.value: As an agent in a million-item workspace, pm context and pm next give me a correct working set in under a second and a bounded token budget, without me knowing how big the workspace is
Agent story for the scale-out initiative (per capability-epic agent-story convention, changelog-excluded). Defines the experience bar the pm-9rxu children must jointly clear.

On the synthetic 1M-item workspace: a fresh agent session can bootstrap (context -> next -> get -> claim) with every response sub-second and under the documented token budget; truncated views always say how to page deeper; no command requires the agent to adjust flags for workspace size
